census-housing.Communication: Distribution of households by communication items.
census-housing.ConstructionYear: Distribution of housing by year of construction.
census-housing.Electricity: Distribution of electricity access by sector.
census-housing.Floor: Distribution of housing by floor material type.
census-housing.Fuel: Distribution of housing by cooking fuel type.
census-housing.Lighting: Distribution of housing by lighting source.
census-housing.Occupancy: Distribution of households by occupancy status.
census-housing.Ownership: Distribution of housing by ownership status.
census-housing.Persons: Distribution of households by number of persons.
census-housing.Quarters: Distribution of households by living quarters type.
census-housing.Roof: Distribution of housing by roof material type.
census-housing.Rooms: Distribution of housing by number of rooms.
census-housing.Structure: Distribution of housing by building structure type.
census-housing.Toilet: Distribution of housing by toilet facility type.
census-housing.Unit: Distribution of housing by unit type.
census-housing.Walls: Distribution of housing by wall material type.
census-housing.Waste: Distribution of housing by solid waste disposal method.
census-housing.Water: Distribution of housing by drinking water source.

census-population.AgeGroup: Distribution of the population by age groups.
census-population.Dependency: Dependency ratios and age group distribution.
census-population.Economy: Distribution of the population by economic activity.
census-population.Education: Distribution of the population by educational attainment.
census-population.Employment: Distribution of the population by employment status.
census-population.Ethnicity: Distribution of the population by ethnic group
census-population.Gender: Distribution of the population by gender.
census-population.Growth: Population growth rates and intercensal metrics.
census-population.Industry: Distribution of population by employment industry.
census-population.Laborforce: Labor force participation rates by gender.
census-population.Literacy: Literacy rates by sector and gender.
census-population.Marital: Distribution of the population by marital status.
census-population.Migration: Distribution of population by migration patterns.
census-population.Population: Population overview with sex ratio and density.
census-population.RelationshipToHead: Distribution of the population by relationship to household head.
census-population.Religion: Distribution of the population by religious affiliation.
census-population.Sectoral: Distribution of population by sector (rural, urban, estate).
census-population.Sectors: Employment distribution by sector (agricultural vs. non-agricultural).
census-population.Unemployment: Unemployment rates by education and gender.

result.When: Specify the year or date for which you want to retrieve data. If the exact time is not available, the closest available data will be used.

<region_id>:<region_type>.description: Returns data for child regions of type <region_type> in <region_id>.

<region_id1>,<region_id2>.description: Returns data for a list of regions.

<region_id1>,<region_id2>,<region_id3>.description: Returns data for a list of regions.

<region_id1>...<region_id2>.description: Returns data for a range of regions.

<region_id>@<distance>.description: Returns regions of the same type within a specified distance of <region_id>.

params.1st: Highlights the most common category in each region
params.Top: Highlights the most common category in each region
params.2nd: Highlights the 2nd most common category in each region
params.3rd: Highlights the 3rd most common category in each region
params.Bottom: Highlights the least common category in each region
params.1stPct: Shows the percentage share of the most common category in each region
params.2ndPct: Shows the percentage share of the 2nd most common category in each region
params.Change: Shows the change in the selected metric between two time periods. Requires an interval (two years) in the When field.
params.Top3: Colors each region based on its top 3 categories combined, assigning a unique color to each unique combination
params.Diversity: Shows the Religious Diversity Index (RDI) for each region, measuring how evenly distributed the categories are
params.DiversityPew: Shows the Pew-adjusted Religious Diversity Index for each region, using grouped categories similar to Pew Research methodology
